features.name: Add skill_type column to skills table
features.spec: Migration: ALTER TABLE skills ADD COLUMN skill_type VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'general' CHECK (skill_type IN ('general','integration','board','system')). Add index.
features.test: Run migration. Verify existing skills have skill_type='general'. Insert a skill with skill_type='integration'.

features.name: Update SkillsService + DTOs for skill_type
features.spec: Add skill_type to CreateSkillDto, UpdateSkillDto. Add findAll filter by skill_type in SkillsService.
features.test: POST /skills with skill_type='integration' succeeds. GET /skills?skill_type=integration returns only integration skills.

features.name: Create integration_definitions table
features.spec: Migration: CREATE TABLE integration_definitions with columns: id, account_id, slug, name, description, icon, categories, auth_type, auth_config, config_fields, skill_id, setup_guide, is_system, proxy_base_url, timestamps. UNIQUE(account_id, slug).
features.test: Table exists. Insert a row. Unique constraint prevents duplicate slugs per account.

features.name: Create integration_connections table
features.spec: Migration: CREATE TABLE integration_connections with: id, account_id, definition_id FK, credentials (encrypted TEXT), token_expires_at, scopes, status, verified_at, last_used_at, error_message, config JSONB, external_account_name, test_conversation_id FK, timestamps. UNIQUE(account_id, definition_id).
features.test: Table exists. Insert a connection linked to a definition. Unique constraint works.

features.name: Create board_integration_refs table
features.spec: Migration: CREATE TABLE board_integration_refs with: id, board_id FK, connection_id FK, is_required, created_at. UNIQUE(board_id, connection_id).
features.test: Table exists. Insert a ref linking a board to a connection. Unique constraint works.

features.name: RLS policies for all new tables
features.spec: Enable RLS on integration_definitions, integration_connections, board_integration_refs. Policies: account-scoped SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE using get_auth_user_account_ids().
features.test: With RLS enabled, user can only access their own account's data. Cross-account access blocked.

features.name: IntegrationsModule NestJS module structure
features.spec: Create backend/src/integrations/ with integrations.module.ts, register in app.module.ts. Import SupabaseModule, SkillsModule.
features.test: Backend starts without errors. Module is loaded.

features.name: Integration definitions CRUD controller + service
features.spec: IntegrationsController: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE for /accounts/:id/integrations/definitions. IntegrationsService: findAllDefinitions, createDefinition, updateDefinition, removeDefinition. DTOs: CreateDefinitionDto, UpdateDefinitionDto.
features.test: CRUD operations work via API. System definitions (is_system=true) cannot be deleted by users.

features.name: Integration connections CRUD controller + service
features.spec: Endpoints: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE for /accounts/:id/integrations/connections. CreateConnectionDto, UpdateConnectionDto. Service: createConnection (encrypts credentials blob), findAllConnections (masks credentials), updateConnection, removeConnection.
features.test: Create connection with API key credentials. GET returns masked values. Internal decrypt returns real values.

features.name: Board integration refs controller + service
features.spec: Endpoints: GET/POST/DELETE for /accounts/:id/boards/:boardId/integration-refs. Service: addRef, removeRef, getRefsForBoard.
features.test: Link a connection to a board. GET returns the linked connections. DELETE removes the link.

features.name: Credential encryption (blob encrypt/decrypt)
features.spec: IntegrationsService methods: encryptCredentials(obj) encrypts entire JSON blob as one AES-256-GCM value. decryptCredentials(encrypted) returns parsed object. maskCredentials(obj) masks sensitive fields. Reuse encryption.util.ts.
features.test: Encrypt {api_key:'sk-xxx'}. Decrypt returns original. Mask returns {api_key:'sk-****xxx'}.

features.name: OAuth controller (authorize + callback endpoints)
features.spec: GET /accounts/:id/integrations/oauth/:defId/authorize: reads auth_config, generates PKCE, stores state, returns redirect_url. GET /integrations/oauth/callback: validates state, exchanges code, encrypts tokens, creates/updates connection, redirects to frontend.
features.test: Authorize returns valid redirect URL with state+PKCE. Callback with mock code creates connection with status='active'.

features.name: OAuth service (code exchange, PKCE, state management)
features.spec: OAuthService: generatePKCE(), storeState(), validateState(), exchangeCode(). In-memory Map for state storage. PKCE with S256 challenge method.
features.test: PKCE verifier/challenge pair validates correctly. State stored and retrieved. Code exchange sends correct POST to token_url.

features.name: Token refresh service (cron + concurrency locks)
features.spec: @Cron(EVERY_5_MINUTES) checks connections where token_expires_at < now() + 10min. Refreshes using refresh_url from definition. In-memory lock Map per connection ID for concurrency safety. On failure: status='expired', error_message set.
features.test: Connection with short expiry gets refreshed by cron. Concurrent refresh attempts are deduplicated. Failed refresh marks status='expired'.

features.name: Execution bridge in buildBoardSystemPrompt()
features.spec: In conversations.service.ts buildBoardSystemPrompt(), after skills/knowledge injection: fetch board integration refs, decrypt credentials, load linked Skills, inject as === INTEGRATION: Name === blocks with skill instructions + credentials.
features.test: Create board with linked integration. Start conversation. System prompt includes integration skill instructions and decrypted credentials.

features.name: Frontend TypeScript types
features.spec: Create frontend/src/types/integration.ts with: IntegrationDefinition, IntegrationConnection, BoardIntegrationRef, IntegrationAuthConfig, IntegrationConfigField, CreateDefinitionPayload, CreateConnectionPayload interfaces.
features.test: Types compile without errors. Used correctly by components.

features.name: <IntegrationCatalog /> component
features.spec: Grid of integration definitions. Each card: icon, name, description, categories badges, status badge (Connected/Not connected/Error). 'Connect' button for unconnected, 'Manage' for connected. Filter by category. Search by name.
features.test: Renders grid of definitions. Filter/search works. Click Connect opens setup dialog. Click Manage opens connection card.

features.name: <IntegrationConnectionCard /> component
features.spec: Shows single connection: icon, name, status badge, external_account_name, last_used_at, config summary. Actions: Edit, Disconnect, Test. In board mode: Add to Board / Remove from Board toggle.
features.test: Renders connection info. Edit opens setup dialog. Disconnect calls DELETE. Board mode toggle works.

features.name: <IntegrationSetupDialog /> component
features.spec: Split layout: left side = credential fields (dynamic from config_fields/auth_config), right side = inline test chat. For API key: input fields. For OAuth: 'Connect with [Provider]' button that opens popup. Enable/disable toggle. Save button.
features.test: API key: shows fields, saves credentials. OAuth: opens popup, handles callback. Test chat works inline.

features.name: <IntegrationTestChat /> component
features.spec: Inline chat panel reusing TaskAIChat pattern: getOrCreateConversation() with integration context, sendMessageBackground(), polling for responses. Shows integration skill instructions in context. Compact layout for dialog embedding.
features.test: Creates test conversation. Sends message. Receives OpenClaw response with integration context. Renders in compact layout.

features.name: <IntegrationCreateDialog /> component
features.spec: Form: name, description, icon (emoji picker), auth_type dropdown (api_key/oauth2/webhook/basic/none). If api_key: dynamic field builder. If oauth2: auth URL, token URL, scopes, client ID/secret. Skill editor or link existing skill. Setup guide markdown textarea. Save/Export JSON buttons.
features.test: Create custom integration with api_key auth. Create with oauth2 auth. Link a skill. Export as JSON.

features.name: <IntegrationManager /> modal component
features.spec: Main orchestrator modal. Props: mode ('settings'|'board'), boardId?, onClose?. Tabs: Catalog, My Connections, Create Custom. In board mode: shows 'Add to Board' toggles. Composes IntegrationCatalog, IntegrationConnectionCard, IntegrationSetupDialog, IntegrationCreateDialog.
features.test: Opens in settings mode: shows full catalog. Opens in board mode: shows catalog with board linking. Create custom works. Connect/disconnect works.

features.name: Settings integrations page rewrite
features.spec: Rewrite frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/integrations/page.tsx. Top section: IntegrationManager in settings mode (embedded, not modal). Below: keep existing Sources section (Notion/ClickUp) and CommTools section unchanged.
features.test: Page loads. Shows integration catalog at top. Sources section below still works. CommTools section still works.

features.name: Board header integration display update
features.spec: Update board-header.tsx: replace getBoardIntegrations() call with new API for board_integration_refs. Show connected integration icons from new system. Click opens IntegrationManager modal in board mode.
features.test: Board header shows integration icons from new system. Click opens IntegrationManager modal. Add/remove integration from board works.

features.name: Board settings integration management update
features.spec: Update board settings page: replace old integration list with IntegrationManager component in board mode. Remove dependency on old board integration actions.
features.test: Board settings shows IntegrationManager. Can add/remove integrations. Old integration UI replaced.

features.name: Frontend actions for new API endpoints
features.spec: New/updated actions in settings/integrations/actions.ts and boards/actions.ts: getDefinitions(), createDefinition(), updateDefinition(), deleteDefinition(), getConnections(), createConnection(), updateConnection(), deleteConnection(), getBoardIntegrationRefs(), addBoardIntegrationRef(), removeBoardIntegrationRef(), initiateOAuth(), testConnection().
features.test: Each action calls correct backend endpoint. Returns typed data. Error handling works.

features.name: Seed: X/Twitter definition + skill
features.spec: Integration definition (api_key auth, fields: api_key, api_secret, access_token, access_token_secret) + Skill teaching OpenClaw X API v2 endpoints, tweet creation, media upload, rate limits, auth headers.
features.test: Definition inserted. Skill inserted with skill_type='integration'. Linked correctly.

features.name: Seed: Slack definition + skill
features.spec: Integration definition (oauth2 auth, authorization_url, token_url, scopes) + Skill teaching OpenClaw Slack Web API (chat.postMessage, channels.list, Block Kit).
features.test: Definition inserted with correct auth_config. Skill covers key Slack API methods.

features.test: Definition and skill inserted and linked.

features.name: Data migration: existing board integrations to new tables
features.spec: Migration script: read board_instances.settings_override.integrations, create integration_definitions + integration_connections + board_integration_refs rows. Preserve encrypted credentials.
features.test: Existing board integrations appear in new tables. Board still shows correct integrations via new API.
